task_completion.description: Open the base rocket design in OpenRocket
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket application is open with a rocket design loaded, showing components like 'Inner Tube' or 'Motor Mount' in the component tree.

task_completion.description: Modify the motor mount inner tube to a 3-motor cluster pattern
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket design view (e.g., rear view) shows 3 motors arranged in a cluster, or the component configuration dialog for the Inner Tube shows the 'Cluster' tab configured for 3 motors.

task_completion.description: Run a flight simulation with the new motor configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Flight simulations' tab in OpenRocket is visible, showing a completed simulation run with the new motor configuration, displaying metrics such as stability, altitude, and max velocity.

task_completion.description: Save the modified design to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket window title displays 'cluster_conversion.ork', or a 'Save As' dialog is visible saving the file to '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/cluster_conversion.ork'.

task_completion.description: Document the motor selection and key flight metrics in a text report
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing the file 'cluster_report.txt' (or saving to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/cluster_report.txt') with text containing the motor selection, altitude, max velocity, and stability.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the design and run simulations
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenRocket graphical interface (component configuration, simulation tabs) rather than terminal commands editing the ORK XML file directly.

integrity.description: The flight metrics in the report appear to be derived from actual simulation results
integrity.visual_evidence: The values for altitude, max velocity, and stability in the text report match the values shown in the OpenRocket 'Flight simulations' tab.

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the motor mount to a cluster
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual confirmation of the 3-motor cluster in the OpenRocket GUI, ensuring the agent didn't just save the unmodified base file under the new name.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The base design file is 'simple_model_rocket.ork'. The modified design must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/cluster_conversion.ork'. The text report must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/cluster_report.txt'.
